# -(_:_:)

**Operator**

Returns a point that‚Äôs the element-wise difference of a point‚Äôs `x`, `y`, and `z` and a size‚Äôs `width`, `height`, and `depth`.

## Declaration

static func - (lhs: Point3DFloat, rhs: Size3DFloat) -> Point3DFloat
